column8: Sylvia doesn't have enough money, so she can't buy a new computer. If Sylvia_________________enough money, she'd buy a new computer.
column9: The twins don't see their friends often because they're very busy. If the twins weren't so busy, they____________their friends more often.
column10: I don't live in a city, so there's not much to do in the evening. If I_____________in a city, there would be lots to do in the evening.
column11: Grandma won't get a dog because she lives in a small flat. If Grandma_____________in a small flat, she'd get a dog.
column12: You use your mobile a lot, so you have large phone bills.If you didn't use your mobile so much, you____________large phone bills.
column13: I think you should tell your parents the truth. If I_________________you, I'd tell your parents the truth.
